name: Power Menu
format:
<template>
  <v-dialog v-model="showDialog" max-width="320">
    <v-card>
      <v-card-title class="text-h6">System Power</v-card-title>
      <v-card-text>Active control will be interrupted.</v-card-text>
      <v-card-actions>
        <v-btn @click="doAction('reboot')" color="warning" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-restart">
          Reboot
        </v-btn>
        <v-btn @click="doAction('shutdown')" color="error" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-power">
          Shutdown
        </v-btn>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn @click="showDialog = false" variant="text">Cancel</v-btn>
      </v-card-actions>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script>
  export default {
    data() {
      return { showDialog: false }
    },
    mounted() {
      // collapse the widget wrapper so it takes no grid space
      const wrapper = this.$el.parentElement
      if (wrapper) {
        wrapper.style.display = 'contents'
      }
    },
    watch: {
      msg() {
        this.showDialog = true
      }
    },
    methods: {
      doAction(action) {
        this.showDialog = false
        this.send({ payload: action })
      }
    }
  }
</script>
